notes: All card images are stored as local JPG files in public/decks/<deck-id>/<code>.jpg.
Raw stat modeling remains deterministic and normalized in app/backend deck generation.

source.wikipediaTitle: McDonnell Douglas F/A-18 Hornet in Australian service

queryChain: Bugatti Chiron Super Sport sports car
Bugatti Veyron Super Sport sports car

statModel.approach: Deterministic per-card normalization to 1..100 with reproducible seeded offsets from card name and tier, then monotonic mapping to real-world proxy units.
statModel.note: Proxy raw units are generated for gameplay consistency and comparability across decks.
